description: Your portal for finding unique accommodations on the Uruguay river coast in Entre Rios.
shortDescription: Discover accommodations on the Uruguay River coast.
mateTagline: Made with mate on the Uruguay coast
newsletterDescription: Subscribe and stay up to date with new accommodations, events and exclusive discounts in the Litoral.
newsletterShortDescription: Get news, exclusive offers and travel guides from the Litoral in your inbox.
